# mxroute_dns (Data Source)

Fetches the DNS records MXroute publishes for a mail domain (MX, SPF, DKIM, and verification).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_dns" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to look up DNS records for.

### Read-Only

- `dkim` (Attributes) The DKIM record for the domain, or null when none is published. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dkim))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the domain name.
- `mx_records` (Attributes List) The MX records for the domain, in priority order. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mx_records))
- `spf` (Attributes) The SPF record for the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spf))
- `verification` (Attributes) The domain verification record, or null when none is published. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verification))

<a id="nestedatt--dkim"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dkim`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The DNS record name.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type.
- `value` (String) The DNS record value.


<a id="nestedatt--mx_records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mx_records`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the record.
- `hostname` (String) The mail server hostname.
- `priority` (Number) The MX record priority (lower is preferred).


<a id="nestedatt--spf"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spf`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The DNS record name.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type.
- `value` (String) The DNS record value.


<a id="nestedatt--verification"></a>
### Nested Schema for `verification`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the record.
- `name` (String) The DNS record name.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type.
- `value` (String) The DNS record value.
